name: browser_action
description: Perform browser automation actions using Playwright. Navigate pages, click elements, fill forms, take screenshots, and extract page content.

url.description: URL to navigate to (required for 'navigate' action)

selector.description: CSS or text selector for the target element (required for 'click', 'fill', 'get_text')

value.description: Value to fill into a form field (required for 'fill' action)

script.description: JavaScript code to evaluate in the page context (required for 'evaluate' action)
